name: Vouching
description: Peer endorsement. One agent attests another is trustworthy in the network. Requires n-of-k threshold to activate influence weight.

thresholds.description: Vouching activates influence weight only after ≥3 distinct vouchers with combined weight ≥15

notes: High influence weight but slow decay. Vouches are sticky — retractions require a separate negative attestation. Voucher's own trust score scales the effective weight.
